display.purpose: Dashboard hero data — next due dates, aircraft identifiers. Once per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Screen-level and section headings. Three sizes (Large/Medium/Small) for hierarchy within complex screens.

title.purpose: Card headings, form section labels, tab labels, toolbar titles.

body.purpose: Primary paragraph content and form values. System sans for native rendering quality in data-dense contexts.

label.purpose: Button labels (UPPERCASE), form field labels, badge text, timestamps.

data.purpose: JetBrains Mono reserved for tail numbers, serial numbers, engine hours, tach times — any value where character alignment is semantic.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default for all state transitions: hover, focus, selection, sheet reveal. Ease out; no bounce, no elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width filled button for primary actions (Save Changes, Add Entry). UPPERCASE Bold label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 56px; background: #1A5FAE; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 16px; padding: 0 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #004785; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1A5FAE; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #001849; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #E0E0E0; color: #9E9E9E; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined button for Cancel and non-destructive secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 56px; background: transparent; color: #1A5FAE; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid #1A5FAE; border-radius: 16px; padding: 0 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #D5E3FF; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1A5FAE; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { color: #9E9E9E; border-color: #E0E0E0; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Outlined button in error-tone for destructive secondary actions: Delete, Dismiss, irreversible operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 56px; background: transparent; color: #B3261E; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid #B3261E; border-radius: 16px; padding: 0 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #FDECEA; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B3261E; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { color: #9E9E9E; border-color: #E0E0E0; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Standard card surface — squawk cards, task cards, maintenance log entries. No shadow; tonal elevation only.
components.html:
Oil leak on left engine
Added 3 days ago • HIGH
components.css: .ds-card { background: #EEF1F6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1C1B1F; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #525E72; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline stamp-shaped badge for squawk status and task priority. 4dp radius reads as a label, not a pill.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--open { background: transparent; color: #525E72; } .ds-badge--addressed { background: #D5E3FF; color: #001849; } .ds-badge--dismissed { background: #E7E0EC; color: #49454F; }

components.name: Segmented Filter
components.description: Two-option tab filter used on list screens (Open / Closed squawks, Active / Completed tasks).
components.css: .ds-seg-row { display: flex; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #BCC4D0; border-radius: 40px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-seg-btn { flex: 1; height: 40px; background: transparent; color: #525E72; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-seg-btn--selected { background: #1A5FAE; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Technical Data Field
components.description: Monospace display for tail numbers, serial numbers, engine hours — any value where character alignment is semantic.
components.css: .ds-data-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-data-label { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #525E72; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-data-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1C1B1F; letter-spacing: 0; }

components.name: Status Indicator Row
components.description: Compliance status row used in task and inspection lists. Green = airworthy/compliant, amber = caution/due soon.
components.html:
Airworthy
Due in 14 days
components.css: .ds-status-ok, .ds-status-warn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-status-ok { color: #276B39; } .ds-status-warn { color: #8B5E00; }

narrative.overview:
Every screen is a page in a regulation-compliant maintenance record. Nothing decorates; everything documents. The aviation blue is ink on vellum. Space Grotesk is the hand that signs the form. The interface does not hurry the user — it makes each entry feel considered and permanent.

The light theme is not a safe default. It is the deliberate choice: a logbook is a paper artifact, and this screen extends that physical register. The palette is derived from glass cockpit references — the Garmin G1000 panel blue, advisory amber annunciators, the green-and-amber visual language of IFR compliance charts.

The system explicitly rejects the SaaS dashboard aesthetic. No hero-metric grids, no identical icon-cards, no at-a-glance information packing that sacrifices trust for density.
keyCharacteristics: Aviation-specific color semantics carried consistently across every surface
Typographic hierarchy does the work; decoration does not
Confident, structured controls — every action feels committed
Safety-critical status (OVERDUE, DUE SOON) always surfaces first

rules.name: The Advisory Rule
rules.body: Instrument Amber (tertiary) appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its power comes from scarcity. A screen full of amber has no amber.

rules.name: The Semantic Lock Rule
rules.body: Airworthy Green and Caution Amber are semantic signals, not decorative colors. They may not appear for brand moments, empty state illustrations, or visual interest.

rules.name: The Mono Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for technical aviation data: tail numbers, serial numbers, tach/Hobbs times, airframe hours. It never appears in UI chrome.

rules.name: The Uppercase Commitment Rule
rules.body: All button labels render UPPERCASE with Bold weight. Sentence case everywhere else. Uppercase signals commitment; a button is a decision, not an option.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce custom elevation parameters or manual shadow modifiers. Tonal elevation is the system. If separation feels insufficient, fix the surface color assignment.

dos: Do use WingslogTypography.dataLarge / dataMedium / dataSmall (JetBrains Mono) for every tail number, serial number, engine hour, tach time, and airframe hour.
Do keep Instrument Amber (tertiary) to ≤10% of any screen's color moments.
Do surface OVERDUE and DUE SOON status at the top of every list.
Do use Spacing.screenPadding (24dp) as the horizontal inset for all screen-level content.
Do reserve Airworthy Green (#276B39) and Caution Amber (#8B5E00) for compliance and status semantics only.
Do render button labels UPPERCASE + Bold.
Do prefer tonal surface hierarchy over manual shadows.
Do use DetailSheet (bottom sheet, always fully expanded) for record details.
Do disable dynamic color. The aviation palette is the brand.
donts: Don't expose multi-step complexity on a single form. Use tabs or wizard flows.
Don't use spreadsheet-style tables or dense grid layouts on primary screens.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism fills, hero-metric grids, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't use Instrument Amber for anything non-advisory.
Don't use border-left or border-right stripes greater than 1dp as decorative callout accents.
Don't introduce custom shadow or elevation modifier values.
Don't use Space Grotesk for body text, form field values, or dense data labels.
Don't use JetBrains Mono for anything that is not a technical measurement or identifier.
Don't add decorative motion: no orchestrated entrances, no elastic or bounce easing.
